welcome:

With this bot, you can create professional presentations in just a few minutes.

selectLanguage: Tilni tanlang / Выберите язык / Select language / Sprache wählen:
help: Tezkor Slide AI - Help 📝 Creating a presentation: 1. Click "New presentation" 2. Enter the topic 3. Enter your name 4. Enter teacher's name 5. Choose if outline is needed 6. Select number of slides 7. Choose a design 💰 Prices: • 6 slides - $1 • 8 slides - $1.5 • 10 slides - $1.7 • 12 slides - $2 🔧 Commands: /start - Restart the bot /new - New presentation /balance - Check balance /language - Change language /help - Help
enterTopic: 📝 Enter the presentation topic Example: "Ecology and Environmental Protection" Topic must be between 5 and 500 characters.
nameTooShort: ❌ Name is too short. Enter at least 2 characters.
askReja: 📋 Do you need an outline page? The outline shows the main topics on page 2.
paymentInstructions: 💳 Top up balance 📱 Card number: 8600 1234 5678 9012 👤 Owner: Tezkor Slide AI ✅ After payment, send a screenshot. Admin will verify and top up your balance.
paymentReceived: ✅ Screenshot received! Admin will verify and top up your balance soon. Thank you for your patience! 🙏
topicTooShort: ❌ Topic is too short. Enter at least 5 characters.
topicTooLong: ❌ Topic is too long. Maximum 500 characters.
confirmGeneration: 📋 Presentation details: Confirm creation? 💡 1 credit will be deducted.
generationQueued: ⏳ Added to queue ID: {id} We'll notify you when it's ready.
insufficientCredits: ❌ Insufficient credits! Please top up your balance.
missingData: ❌ Data is incomplete. Please start over.
noPresentations: 📭 You don't have any presentations yet.
